title: Syrian Chicken Shawarma
description: A flavorful and aromatic Middle Eastern-inspired dish, featuring marinated chicken grilled to perfection and served in a warm pita with fresh toppings.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together sweet syrup, syrian olive oil, and grill seasoning.
Add the chicken breast to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for a few minutes.
Assemble the shawarma by spreading a layer of the chicken on each pita, followed by a tomato, onion, cucumber, and parsley.
